source_pr.title: planner: add more test cases for quick binding
source_pr.body:
<!--

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #39199

Problem Summary: planner: add more test cases for quick binding

### What is changed and how it works?

planner: add more test cases for quick binding

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: No concrete flaky failure signature recorded in the case data; PR adds more quick binding test cases and updates expected hint strings.
failure_signature: No concrete flaky signature recorded; PR adds quick binding test cases and updates expectations.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR adds more quick binding test cases and updates expected hint strings. The case data does not show a concrete flaky signature or a targeted stabilization for nondeterminism; keep it as insufficient evidence rather than mislabeling it as ORDER BY-related flakiness.
fix_pattern: Add quick binding test cases and update expected hint strings; no clearly evidenced anti-flake stabilization in the case.

evidence: evidence: {`select /*+ inl_join(t1) */ * from t1, t2 where t1.a=t2.a and t1.b<? and t2.b<? order by t1.a limit 5`, "inl_join(@`sel_1` `test`.`t1`), use_index(@`sel_1` `test`.`t1` `k_a`), no_order_index(@`sel_1` `test`.`t1` `k_a`), use_index(@`sel_1` `test`.`t2` )", nil}, (infoschema/test/clustertablestest/cluster_tables_test.go)
